title: Spryzeen's Ore Glint
body:
![texture pack cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ktOGSHXh/images/8bf4f7140b6ca92034c9493d83dc6ff2c0150c59.jpeg)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yHVykFpZ6bs" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#### Spryzeen's Ore Glint was made to be the unobtrusive alternative among emissive ore texture packs, All ores have a subtle glimmer that becomes more noticeable over time

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something
- The pack uses core shaders, you don't need optifine to see it glow!
- Support all vanilla ores (Coal [addon], Copper, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, Lapis, Redstone, Nether Gold, Nether Quartz and Ancient Debris)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Addons</summary>

The pack has an addon for coal, if you want it... open the pack zip and extract the addon from the ADDONS carpet

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!

</details>
